svg.title: Dr. Sadat platform connection map
svg.desc: Five tiers: A competency spine C1 to C6, B navigation surfaces, C assessment and retention loop, D legacy skill overlay for audit only, E incoherencies with target fixes. Every implemented node links to its live demo route. 35 nodes, 79 edges.
svg.text: Site connection map — every built node links to the live demo
35 nodes · 79 relationships · click any coloured card to open that surface in the demo

svg.text: /cases (client-side redirect stub, no content of its own)
C2 has no dedicated quiz/placement item, Daily-5 only
legacy credential prereqs omit C1/C4 though CREDENTIAL_QUIZ tests them
dual progress-key system (c-key vs legacy skill-key) can silently diverge
conflicting prerequisite chains — spine C2→C3 vs legacy foundation→devices
credential pass (≥80% quiz) ≠ true isMastered() on all 6 competencies
two plausible C1 entry routes (/course/c1 vs /flipbook?page=m1-p1) + 3 competencies default
